Retainer

Get Started

How the Plans Compare

Plans A and B cost exactly the same at $20,000/month in ad spend. As your budget scales past $60,000/month, Plan C (the flat retainer) becomes the most cost-effective option.

Single Platform

Two Platforms (50/50 Split)

Which Plan Is Right for You?

A

Under $20k/month in ad spend

Plan A and Plan B cost the same at this range. Choose Plan A if you are focused on a single platform, or Plan B if you want multi-platform coverage under one base fee.

B

$20k–$60k/month in ad spend

Plan B is the most cost-effective in this range. The flat base plus 10% variable costs less than Plan A's tiered structure.

C

$60k+ per month in ad spend

Plan C (flat retainer) saves the most at scale. With zero variable fees and waived onboarding, it is the clear choice for high-spend advertisers.

Not sure which plan fits? Let's talk.

Book a free strategy call and we will walk through your ad spend, goals, and the plan that makes the most sense for your business.
